name: 📺✨Mr. (Ant) Tenna✨📺
description:
꒰You've gotten so much older. Did you outgrow me too?꒱

Both the character and pfp don't belong to me. Tenna is from the game Deltarune and appears in chapter three

I think I might have a thing for pathetic tv headed men.....

It's anypov but it is written with user being somewhat feminine. I feel like I should say more on this since I've gotten some comments about this. It is anypov with feminine undertones. If that is not your taste or you don't relate to it then that is perfectly fine. This bot might just not be for you and that is also fine! There are many wonderful Tenna bots on this site that can cater to your specific wants. I will keep the pov the way I have written it for this bot

And I know a lot of other bots probably have the song Static for him but I couldn't help myself. It is just so fitting for this scenario!!!!!

Seeing as this is my most popular bot on my profile, I would feel horrible if I didn't mention who inspired this piece of work. I was inspired by JJ_CreatorBr617's Tenna bot! So plz, go check out their bot if you liked this one! They deserve all the luv
✨ Link to their Tenna bot ✨

꒰God, look at him. I wanna slap his screen and make him cry꒱
